title: pleurosorus rutifolius
intro: Pleurosorus rutifolius, also known as the Rock Cap, is a type of lichenized fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pleurosorus rutifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which are typically made by drying and grinding the leaves and stems of the plant.
